halo 真曼

恩哈路：「我知道很多足球員都會在簽約時說【這就是我夢寐以求的球隊】。我尊重這一點，但我的情況有所不同。」

「從我小時候就認識我的人都知道，我的兄弟姐妹也支持曼聯，我們會花錢去觀看曼聯的比賽，在尼日利亞，你必須擁有收費體育頻道來觀看，但並非所有人都能負擔得起。我的父母負擔不起，因此必須在觀賞中心付費觀看。我們會付費觀看曼聯的比賽。」

「我在Ajegunl長大，那裡就像一個貧民窟，生活很困難。到了周末，每個人都很興奮，因為他們想看曼聯的比賽。為了上學，你會開始儲蓄，你會在家吃飯，家長會給你一些零用錢去學校，也許在那裡吃午餐，但是總會把零用錢一點一點地節省下來為周末看球賽直播做好準備。穿上球衣，在周末之前洗好衣服。繼續去觀賞中心，那裡很瘋狂。其他一些球迷希望曼聯輸掉比賽，作為曼聯球迷想曼聯獲勝，你就會開始爭吵，大喊，尖叫等等。在一些小房間裡，有些房間有200人在觀看。去另一個房間，看到有500個人。但即使那樣，你還是站在遠方觀看那裡大大小小的屏幕。」

「那時，曼聯是英格蘭最好的球隊。他們贏得每一場比賽，每個賽季，當費格遜爵士在這裡時，你都會看到他們贏得了英超聯賽冠軍。每個人都想與一支獲勝的球隊建立聯繫。那時我年紀還很小，一直關注這球會成長至今。那時，他們還與曼聯球迷會聯繫，因此每週都會召開一次會議，討論曼聯，就像一個小型球迷論壇一樣。」

「當我現在記得所有這些時，我笑著說：【嘩，從Ajegunl去到夢劇院。】這對我來說是一個美好的時刻，我享受著每一刻。這是我一生中最快樂的時刻，為我夢寐以求的球隊效力，那是我年輕時支持的球隊。」

(轉自facebook)

quote.msg: 好少球員可以好似費查咁 上一隊轉位踢好過原來個位 講緊佢青年隊踢右翼 仲話咩新碧咸 但無速度又斬得唔夠好

f24係好典型既天道酬勤，靠勤力、勇敢同加操，令本身算差既體質變到又跑得又撞得，仲有長傳同遠射

其實都唔係咩天份，係球員自身既鬥志同磨練

加利仔都講過覺得自己唔太掂，咪瘋狂加操練出波，搞下搞下連體能都勁埋，當年七小福幾乎每人都有一招，其實咪又係靠苦練，依家睇14+15，由出道到依家都冇進步過，反而仲慢慢轉型做技術型，玩技術玩上腳

「當我現在記得所有這些時，我笑著說：【嘩，從Ajegunl去到夢劇院。】這對我來說是一個美好的時刻，我享受著每一刻。這是我一生中最快樂的時刻，為我夢寐以求的球隊效力，那是我年輕時支持的球隊。」

(轉自facebook)

真曼

replies.msg: james 唔知賽後比so9 屌左幾耐呢

恩哈路：「我知道很多足球員都會在簽約時說【這就是我夢寐以求的球隊】。我尊重這一點，但我的情況有所不同。」

「從我小時候就認識我的人都知道，我的兄弟姐妹也支持曼聯，我們會花錢去觀看曼聯的比賽，在尼日利亞，你必須擁有收費體育頻道來觀看，但並非所有人都能負擔得起。我的父母負擔不起，因此必須在觀賞中心付費觀看。我們會付費觀看曼聯的比賽。」

「我在Ajegunl長大，那裡就像一個貧民窟，生活很困難。到了周末，每個人都很興奮，因為他們想看曼聯的比賽。他們會給你的錢去上學，你會在家吃飯，他們會給你一些零用錢去學校，也許在那裡吃午餐，但是總會把零用錢一點一點地節省下來為周末看球賽直播做好準備。穿上球衣，在周末之前洗好衣服。繼續去觀賞中心，那裡很瘋狂。其他一些球迷希望曼聯輸掉比賽，作為曼聯球迷想曼聯獲勝，你就會開始爭吵，大喊，尖叫等等。在一些小房間裡，有些房間有200人在觀看。去另一個房間，看到有500個人。那裡有職員看守需要你付款才可觀看球賽直播。但即使那樣，你還是站在遠方觀看那裡大大小小的屏幕。」

「那時，曼聯是英格蘭最好的球隊。他們贏得每一場比賽，每個賽季，當費格遜爵士在這裡時，你都會看到他們贏得了英超聯賽冠軍。每個人都想與一支獲勝的球隊建立聯繫。那時我年紀還很小，一直關注這球會成長至今。那時，他們還與曼聯球迷會聯繫，因此每週都會召開一次會議，討論曼聯，就像一個小型球迷論壇一樣。」

「當我現在記得所有這些時，我笑著說："嘩，從Ajegunl去到夢劇院。" 這對我來說是一個美好的時刻，我享受著每一刻。這是我一生中最快樂的時刻，為我夢寐以求的球隊效力，那是我年輕時支持的球隊。」

【最強邊後衛】加歷查：他這項能力世界第一

利物浦名宿加歷查（James Carragher）認為，說到一對一防守的能力，曼聯的萬-比沙卡（Aaron Wan-Bissaka）是世界上最強的邊後衛。
　　在曼聯2比0擊敗曼城的打吡大戰中，萬-比沙卡成功的阻擊了史達寧（Raheem Sterling）。加歷查評論說：「下一次哥迪奧拿（Pep Guardiola）需要做的，是不要讓史達寧面對萬-比沙卡。史達寧是世界上最好的三四名邊路選手之一，但萬-比沙卡卻說：來吧，你過不了我。」
　　「實際上我認為，萬-比沙卡是世界上一對一防守能力最強的邊後衛，我不認為有誰能在他這裡佔到便宜。」

恩哈路：「我知道很多足球員都會在簽約時說【這就是我夢寐以求的球隊】。我尊重這一點，但我的情況有所不同。」

「從我小時候就認識我的人都知道，我的兄弟姐妹也支持曼聯，我們會花錢去觀看曼聯的比賽，在尼日利亞，你必須擁有收費體育頻道來觀看，但並非所有人都能負擔得起。我的父母負擔不起，因此必須在觀賞中心付費觀看。我們會付費觀看曼聯的比賽。」

「我在Ajegunl長大，那裡就像一個貧民窟，生活很困難。到了周末，每個人都很興奮，因為他們想看曼聯的比賽。為了上學，你會開始儲蓄，你會在家吃飯，家長會給你一些零用錢去學校，也許在那裡吃午餐，但是總會把零用錢一點一點地節省下來為周末看球賽直播做好準備。穿上球衣，在周末之前洗好衣服。繼續去觀賞中心，那裡很瘋狂。其他一些球迷希望曼聯輸掉比賽，作為曼聯球迷想曼聯獲勝，你就會開始爭吵，大喊，尖叫等等。在一些小房間裡，有些房間有200人在觀看。去另一個房間，看到有500個人。但即使那樣，你還是站在遠方觀看那裡大大小小的屏幕。」

「那時，曼聯是英格蘭最好的球隊。他們贏得每一場比賽，每個賽季，當費格遜爵士在這裡時，你都會看到他們贏得了英超聯賽冠軍。每個人都想與一支獲勝的球隊建立聯繫。那時我年紀還很小，一直關注這球會成長至今。那時，他們還與曼聯球迷會聯繫，因此每週都會召開一次會議，討論曼聯，就像一個小型球迷論壇一樣。」

「當我現在記得所有這些時，我笑著說：【嘩，從Ajegunl去到夢劇院。】這對我來說是一個美好的時刻，我享受著每一刻。這是我一生中最快樂的時刻，為我夢寐以求的球隊效力，那是我年輕時支持的球隊。」

(轉自facebook)

quote.msg:
估唔到加歷查會咁大方咁大讚AWB

【最強邊後衛】加歷查：他這項能力世界第一

利物浦名宿加歷查（James Carragher）認為，說到一對一防守的能力，曼聯的萬-比沙卡（Aaron Wan-Bissaka）是世界上最強的邊後衛。
　　在曼聯2比0擊敗曼城的打吡大戰中，萬-比沙卡成功的阻擊了史達寧（Raheem Sterling）。加歷查評論說：「下一次哥迪奧拿（Pep Guardiola）需要做的，是不要讓史達寧面對萬-比沙卡。史達寧是世界上最好的三四名邊路選手之一，但萬-比沙卡卻說：來吧，你過不了我。」
　　「實際上我認為，萬-比沙卡是世界上一對一防守能力最強的邊後衛，我不認為有誰能在他這裡佔到便宜。」

利物浦名宿加歷查（James Carragher）認為，說到一對一防守的能力，曼聯的萬-比沙卡（Aaron Wan-Bissaka）是世界上最強的邊後衛。
　　在曼聯2比0擊敗曼城的打吡大戰中，萬-比沙卡成功的阻擊了史達寧（Raheem Sterling）。加歷查評論說：「下一次哥迪奧拿（Pep Guardiola）需要做的，是不要讓史達寧面對萬-比沙卡。史達寧是世界上最好的三四名邊路選手之一，但萬-比沙卡卻說：來吧，你過不了我。」
　　「實際上我認為，萬-比沙卡是世界上一對一防守能力最強的邊後衛，我不認為有誰能在他這裡佔到便宜。」

Former Manchester United coach Rene Meulensteen has revealed that he has texted United midfielder Jesse Lingard in a bid to help the England international rediscover some confidence.

The United academy graduate, though often a regular under Ole Gunnar Solskjaer this term, has struggled for form and consistency.

His form and contributions this season, in terms of goals scored and assists, as well as being represented by new agent Mino Raiola, have led to some questions being asked about his future at Old Trafford beyond this season.

Some supporters have become frustrated with his performance levels and lack of consistency but he played well against Club Brugge and there is hope he can get back to his old form.

In a bid to try and get his confidence back, former United coach Meulensteen, who worked with Lingard during his rise through the club's academy system, has sent him a message in an attempt to get his United career back on track.

Meulensteen told The Athletic: "I sent Jesse a text recently. I told him, ‘Don’t overcomplicate things. Go back into your memory bank.

"Think about your best moments for Man United. Try to rediscover that feeling, take it back to the training ground next week and start putting it back together.

"That way you’ll get back to your best."
Meulensteen went on to add that he thinks Lingard, who joined United at the age of just seven, could have become a little bit 'unstuck' during his United career.

quote.msg:
Former Manchester United coach Rene Meulensteen has revealed that he has texted United midfielder Jesse Lingard in a bid to help the England international rediscover some confidence.

The United academy graduate, though often a regular under Ole Gunnar Solskjaer this term, has struggled for form and consistency.

His form and contributions this season, in terms of goals scored and assists, as well as being represented by new agent Mino Raiola, have led to some questions being asked about his future at Old Trafford beyond this season.

Some supporters have become frustrated with his performance levels and lack of consistency but he played well against Club Brugge and there is hope he can get back to his old form.

In a bid to try and get his confidence back, former United coach Meulensteen, who worked with Lingard during his rise through the club's academy system, has sent him a message in an attempt to get his United career back on track.

Meulensteen told The Athletic: "I sent Jesse a text recently. I told him, ‘Don’t overcomplicate things. Go back into your memory bank.

"Think about your best moments for Man United. Try to rediscover that feeling, take it back to the training ground next week and start putting it back together.

"That way you’ll get back to your best."
Meulensteen went on to add that he thinks Lingard, who joined United at the age of just seven, could have become a little bit 'unstuck' during his United career.

awb需要俾多d時間佢夾下隊波
重點都係佢d隊友唔肯郁

quote.msg:
Former Manchester United coach Rene Meulensteen has revealed that he has texted United midfielder Jesse Lingard in a bid to help the England international rediscover some confidence.

The United academy graduate, though often a regular under Ole Gunnar Solskjaer this term, has struggled for form and consistency.

His form and contributions this season, in terms of goals scored and assists, as well as being represented by new agent Mino Raiola, have led to some questions being asked about his future at Old Trafford beyond this season.

Some supporters have become frustrated with his performance levels and lack of consistency but he played well against Club Brugge and there is hope he can get back to his old form.

In a bid to try and get his confidence back, former United coach Meulensteen, who worked with Lingard during his rise through the club's academy system, has sent him a message in an attempt to get his United career back on track.

Meulensteen told The Athletic: "I sent Jesse a text recently. I told him, ‘Don’t overcomplicate things. Go back into your memory bank.

"Think about your best moments for Man United. Try to rediscover that feeling, take it back to the training ground next week and start putting it back together.

"That way you’ll get back to your best."
Meulensteen went on to add that he thinks Lingard, who joined United at the age of just seven, could have become a little bit 'unstuck' during his United career.

Some supporters have become frustrated with his performance levels and lack of consistency but he played well against Club Brugge and there is hope he can get back to his old form.
